star_rating_explanation.formula: Service Value = Air Delivery (m³/min) ÷ Input Power (W)
star_rating_explanation.note: Higher Service Value = Higher Star Rating

warranty_policy.fans_warranty: 2 years standard, 5 years for BLDC models
warranty_policy.claim_process: Contact customer care or visit nearest service centre

faqs.question: What is the warranty on V-Guard fans?
faqs.answer: V-Guard fans come with 2 years warranty. BLDC fans come with 5 years warranty.

faqs.question: How much energy does a BLDC fan save?
faqs.answer: V-Guard BLDC fans consume only 28-35W compared to 50-75W of regular induction fans, saving up to 50% electricity.

products.text: The V-Guard INSIGHT-G is a Premium High Speed BLDC Ceiling Fan with 1200mm sweep, 35W BLDC motor, 370 RPM, 235 m³/min air delivery, 5-star BEE rating. Features dust repellent coating, 60V-310V voltage range, remote control, reverse rotation, multi-timer. 5-year warranty.
